object.DiscountedTicket.Name: Fool's Ticket
object.DiscountedTicket.Desc: Hee hee! Only a certified fool would pay full price for this movie.
mail.JojaCap: Yo @!^^You hit the jackpot! You're our 10,000th winner for the limited joja cap. Here’s your gift, enjoy! ^^ - Joja Corp. %item id (O)167 99 %%[#]Joja Cap gift
mail.DarkBallcap: Greetings, @!^^You are the 99,999th fan to receive our team’s limited edition baseball cap. Thank you for your support. ^^ - Black Meteor Baseball Club %item money 1000 1001 %%[#]Acknowledgement from Black Meteor Baseball Club
dialogue.AbigailsBow.Abigail: Haha, looks good, doesn’t it? Matching bows!$h#$action SummerFleur.BetterHats.ResponseHatTopic Abigail'sBow Abigail
dialogue.ArcaneHat.Wizard: $action SummerFleur.BetterHats.ResponseHatTopic ArcaneHat Wizard#Acquiring this hat proves you are an admirable adventurer, but... humanity's understanding of the arcane remains merely on the surface. Perhaps, in exploring the vast and grand mysteries of the arcane, this is merely the first step.
dialogue.Beanie.Sam: $action SummerFleur.BetterHats.ResponseHatTopic Beanie Sam#Hey, isn't that hat the same style as mine?#$e#Oh, just a different color. Looks like we both have good taste, haha!$h
dialogue.BowlerHat.Victor: This hat... you must have earned a lot of money here, right?$h#$action SummerFleur.BetterHats.ResponseHatTopic BowlerHat Victor#$e#I recall we seem to have one at home too. But I can't quite remember where I put it...
dialogue.ChefHat.Harvey: $action SummerFleur.BetterHats.ResponseHatTopic ChefHat Harvey#Ah, a chef hat! You must have learned and cooked quite a few dishes by yourself, right?#$e#Green, healthy ingredients are the key to a healthy diet. Cooking with ingredients you grew yourself must give a real sense of accomplishment.$h
dialogue.ChickenMask.Shane: $action SummerFleur.BetterHats.ResponseHatTopic ChickenMask Shane#Hey! That mask looks pretty cool.#$e#Uh, can you lend it to me sometime? I want to see how my hens react when they see me wearing it.$h
dialogue.ConeHat.Olivia: This cone hat reminds me of my hometown...$s#$action SummerFleur.BetterHats.ResponseHatTopic ConeHat Olivia
dialogue.DeluxeCowboyHat.Sophia: $action SummerFleur.BetterHats.ResponseHatTopic DeluxeCowboyHat Sophia#Wow! Is that the same hat the Prairie King wears?#$e#Tell me where you got it, I want to buy one too!$h
dialogue.FashionHat.Claire: $action SummerFleur.BetterHats.ResponseHatTopic FashionHat Claire#Oh? An actor I really like wore a hat very similar to yours at the awards ceremony yesterday.#$e#Wait, you made it yourself? Could you teach me how to make one sometime? I could ask Emily to join us, she loves sewing.$h
dialogue.FloppyBeanie.Emily: $action SummerFleur.BetterHats.ResponseHatTopic FloppyBeanie Emily#Oh, did you make this hat yourself? Let me take a look.#$e#Haha, it looks pretty similar to mine!$h
dialogue.FrogHat.Sebastian: $action SummerFleur.BetterHats.ResponseHatTopic FrogHat Sebastian#A frog-shaped hat? Do you like frogs too?#$e#I see them near my house all the time. I like listening to the sounds these little guys make.
dialogue.LeprechaunHat.Leah: $action SummerFleur.BetterHats.ResponseHatTopic LeprechaunHat Leah#Oh, a leprechaun hat! Did you find this while foraging near the waterfall?#$e#Cindersap Forest is always full of wild food in the spring.$h
dialogue.Goggles.Maru: $action SummerFleur.BetterHats.ResponseHatTopic Goggles Maru#Hey, @! You're wearing those goggles. Are you working on a gadget too?#$e#I sometimes wear them when I'm working on my own projects to protect my eyes.
dialogue.PageboyCap.Penny: $action SummerFleur.BetterHats.ResponseHatTopic PageboyCap Penny#I read in a book that only well-read people can obtain this hat.#$e#So, you must have read a lot of books, right?$h
dialogue.PlumChapeau.Scarlett: Hi, @! Don't you think your hat matches my hair color?$h#$action SummerFleur.BetterHats.ResponseHatTopic PlumChapeau Scarlett
dialogue.SportsCap.Alex: $action SummerFleur.BetterHats.ResponseHatTopic SportsCap Alex#Whoa, the team on that cap is my favorite team! They just won the league championship last night. Did you see it?
dialogue.SwashbucklerHat.Lance: $action SummerFleur.BetterHats.ResponseHatTopic SwashbucklerHat Lance#*chuckles* Legend has it that the hat on your head is imbued with the power of Dragon Teeth, able to help against the monsters in the volcano.#$e#Me? I'd like to verify the truth of that rumor, but forgive me for not knowing how to craft these hats myself. So, I hope if you can help me verify it...
dialogue.TricornHat.Elliott: $action SummerFleur.BetterHats.ResponseHatTopic TricornHat Elliott#I purchased this hat from a pen pal. Though the style is a bit dated, it is truly exquisite.#$e#Oh, by the by, he also lives by the sea. Doesn't it feel like a marvelous coincidence?$h
dialogue.Tropiclip.Haley: This headpiece will look perfect on a summer beach!$h#$action SummerFleur.BetterHats.ResponseHatTopic Tropiclip Haley
